game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Kitty Powers' Matchmaker**: Players manage a virtual matchmaking agency, starting by selecting a client from a queue and then choosing a suitable date from Kitty's Black Book based on matching personality traits and physical preferences displayed on their profiles. Once a match is made, players send the couple on a date to one of several unlockable restaurant venues, each offering different ambiance and a series of context-sensitive mini-games. During dates, players engage in mini-games such as tapping to select appropriate dialogue responses, swiping to apply makeup, or dragging and dropping gifts, all aimed at increasing the couple's "Love Meter" (a percentage bar). Each mini-game has a time limit (e.g., 10-15 seconds), with successful completion awarding 5-10% Love Meter progress, while failures or incorrect choices can reduce it by 5-15%. Successfully completing dates and achieving a high Love Meter percentage (e.g., 75% or more) earns agency reputation points and in-game currency, which unlock new date venues (e.g., "The Greasy Spoon" at 100 points) and agency upgrades like the salon. Difficulty scales as clients present more complex and conflicting preferences, requiring more strategic matching and higher success rates in mini-games, with a date considered successful if the Love Meter reaches a minimum threshold (e.g., 60%) by the end, otherwise it results in negative client reviews.
game_info.description: Welcome to Kitty Powers' Matchmaker! As a matchmaking agent, your goal is to build a successful dating agency by pairing clients with compatible dates and guiding them through successful romantic encounters. Match personality traits and preferences, then help couples navigate mini-games during their dates to fill the Love Meter. Earn reputation points to unlock new venues and grow your agency. Achieve 75% Love Meter or higher to succeed!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus, select options, and control mini-game actions
Space: Confirm selections and choices
Z: Alternative action button (context-sensitive in mini-games)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and UI navigation test. Validates that the player can navigate through menus, select clients, choose dates, and interact with the basic game flow without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the client selection screen using arrow keys and space. Select the first available client and date option. Progress through one complete date sequence with random but valid inputs in mini-games.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully navigates all menus, completes at least one date mini-game, and reaches either a date success or failure state without crashes. The game state transitions properly between phases.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test. Tests the complete gameplay loop with strategic matching and mini-game performance to achieve high Love Meter percentages and unlock content.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze client and date profiles to make optimal compatibility matches based on personality traits. Execute mini-games with correct timing and choices to maximize Love Meter gains. Complete multiple successful dates to accumulate reputation points and unlock new venues.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete multiple dates with 75%+ Love Meter scores, earn reputation points, unlock at least one new venue, and demonstrate that the win condition (reaching target reputation) is achievable through skilled play.
